components.name: Tips
components.description: Displays informational messages, trading tips, or system notifications to users within the Orderly Network interface.

variants.description: Basic usage with static content
tips: Use 'warning' or 'info' variants for clarity.
Keep messages concise for mobile views.

variants.description: Interactive dismissible tip with state management
tips: Persist dismissal state if needed.
Ensure close button is accessible.

variants.description: Dynamic tips fetched via WebSocket observer
tips: Handle WebSocket reconnection logic.
Prioritize critical alerts over info tips.

components.stylingNotes: Use z-index to ensure tips appear above other UI elements. Responsive width is recommended.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to handle WebSocket disconnection.
Blocking user interaction with persistent tips.

variants.description: Interactive widget with margin mode and liquidation price

Validate margin mode changes before applying.

components.stylingNotes: Align widget with order entry inputs. Use red/green colors for risk levels.
commonMistakes: Ignoring margin mode differences in LTV calculation.
Not updating LTV when position size changes.

Orderly
Balance: {portfolio?.totalUsd?.toFixed(2)} {account?.username}
Markets Positions History

...

  • Bid 1: 49999

Trade {symbol}

setSymbol(e.target.value)} />
Latency: 20ms API: Active
); }
